hooks.command: cd /Users/codex/Desktop/WEBDEV/PERINADE && FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'src/content/'; then npm run i18n:audit 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

cd /Users/codex/Desktop/WEBDEV/PERINADE && FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(astro|ts|tsx)$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
